schema_version.description: Must be harness-operator-nudges-v1 for this shape.

math_reasoning_harness_line.description: Optional second line after reasoning-depth nudges: STEM / witness + checker reminder (RFV, AUTOPILOT, continuity digest).

retrieval_trace_harness_line.description: Optional line after math nudge: auditable external research / retrieval_trace + contradiction sweep reminder (RFV, AUTOPILOT, continuity digest).

rfv_loop_external_struct_hint_line.description: Optional compact line appended to RFV_LOOP_CONTINUE when structured external_research hint applies (prefer_structured + allow_external + last round missing payload). Should reference default strict floors enforced in router-rs (traceable sources, sweep/queries/trace lengths, unknowns key) and point readers to external-research-harness.md.
